message:
chore: Minor fixes and improvements across scripts and tooling

Collection of small but important fixes that improve code quality,
security scanning compliance, and robustness.

Additional Assert→Raise Conversions:
- scripts/base_loss.py: split_tokens divisibility check
- scripts/chat_eval.py: Single-token letter validation with detailed error
- scripts/mid_train.py: Split validation, dataset size check
- scripts/tok_eval.py: Decode validation
- scripts/tok_train.py: Sanity check validation

Additional Nosec Annotations:
- scripts/base_loss.py (B102): exec() for configurator
- scripts/mid_train.py (B102): exec() for configurator
- scripts/base_eval.py (B615): HuggingFace model loading (trusted source)
- dev/repackage_data_reference.py (B615): HuggingFace dataset loading

Network Timeout Additions:
- dev/gen_synthetic_data.py: Added 60s timeout to requests.post()
- tests/test_rustbpe.py: Added 60s timeout to requests.get()

Rationale:
- Prevents indefinite hanging on network issues
- Aligns with best practices for production HTTP clients
- Default timeout of 60s is generous for model API calls

Dashboard Fix:
- scripts/dashboard.py: Corrected waterfall chart y-values for totals

  Previously used placeholder 0 for total bar; now uses actual total_logits value
  for proper visual representation of expert contribution breakdowns.

Dataset Validation:
- scripts/mid_train.py: Added explicit empty dataset check

  Prevents cryptic errors downstream if dataset loading fails or returns empty.

All changes are defensive improvements with no functional impact on correct
usage. They improve error messages, prevent hangs, and satisfy security scanners.

🧠 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
